title: Hale Return
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|italics=1|notoc=1}} {{SpaceStation |image= |name=''Hale Return'' |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type=Medical supply [[Space station/Legends|platform]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |diameter= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the entirety of grid square K-5 in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]. |sector=[[Prefsbelt sector/Legends|Prefsbelt sector]] |system=[[Borosk system/Legends|Borosk system]] |coordinates=K-5 |xyz= |orbited= |distance= |routes= |role= |affiliation=[[Imperial Remnant]] |constructed= |destroyed= |retired= |battles= |owners= |namedcrew= |captains= |registry= |aliases= |population= |interest= |services= |sectors= |modules= }} {{Quote|This is ''Braxant Bonecrusher''. We have a hold full of people requiring urgent medical attention. Please advise.''"
"'' ''Bonecrusher'', this is ''Widowmaker''. You are instructed to dock with medical supply platform ''Hale Return''. Details to follow.|[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and Captain Yage|}} The '''''Hale Return''''' was a medical supply [[Space station/Legends|platform]] used by the [[Imperial Remnant]] that was positioned near [[Borosk/Legends|Borosk]]{{CSWECite|II|8|Hale Return}}—a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories's]] [[Prefsbelt sector/Legends|Prefsbelt sector]] in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]—during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], where the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] were invading [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' when the Remnant was [[Battle of Borosk (Yuuzhan Vong War)|engaged]] with a Yuuzhan Vong [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] in the [[Borosk system/Legends|Borosk system]], the [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class cruiser]] ''[[Braxant Bonecrusher]]''—after having successfully rescued [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] from a Yuuzhan Vong [[slaveship]] during the fighting—was directed to dock at the ''Hale Return'' by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Arien Yage]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] so that the rescued prisoners could receive urgent medical attention. ==Behind the scenes== ''Hale Return'' appeared in [[2003]]'s [[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant|''Force Heretic I: Remnant'']], a novel written by [[Sean Williams]] and [[Shane Dix]] as part of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series. It later got an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', which was published in [[2008]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Hale Return }} [[Category:Imperial Remnant space stations]] [[Category:Prefsbelt sector locations]] [[Category:Space stations in the New Territories]] [[Category:Space stations in the Outer Rim Territories]]
